title: simplywire – Compact Dish Drainer – Plate Drying Rack with Cutlery Basket – Small - Black Powder Coated Steel
features: SMART DESIGN: Uniquely styled ultra-compact organiser maximises your sink draining options when space is at a premium. Ideal for 1-2 persons in a small kitchen or caravan.
SPACE SAVING: Efficient kitchen solution for up to 9 plates with removable plastic cutlery holder. This neat and tidy metal dishrack allows your washing up to drip dry and drain freely.
HYGIENIC: Anti-slip rubber feet protect your surfaces from scratches and allow air flow to prevent trapped water under your glasses, cups, bowls, small pots, and pans.
STRONG AND DURABLE: This hardwearing and rust resistant powder-coated steel wire dish drainer is the perfect dryer for a single person’s dinner plates or breakfast crockery and a few glasses or mugs.
MEASUREMENTS: Please view all the product photographs to locate the annotated product image with all required external and internal measurements. This item is deliberately very compact.
description: Product Description Quality Commitment At simplywire, our focus is on producing a range of quality products and bespoke designs for modern living. Quality materials, production and service are at the heart of everything that we do. Product Description Expertly Designed Our stylish simplywire dish drainers are the ideal way to quickly and safely dry dishes and other tableware items. This uniquely compact unit includes slots for 9 plates and a removable cutlery holder with 2 compartments, ensuring you can dry dishes quickly and easily, even when space is at a premium. Masterfully Crafted simplywire partners with highly respected manufacturers from around the world. We love our products, and we test them rigorously to make sure they perform perfectly. We believe it is our responsibility to create the best products ensuring they are safe whilst remaining stylish and practical. Stylish Storage This dish drainer design is suitable for a small kitchen or caravan, helping maximise your draining space. The drying rack can accommodate up to 9 plates and a few extra pieces of crockery. Available in a sleek matt black finish that can complement many decors and styles, this unit is a great solution for those with minimal space. Durable Quality This sturdy unit is crafted from durable steel wire that has been specially black-powder coated. It also features matching black rubber feet to prevent scratches and ensure stable storage.
